name: Almond Splinters
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Milk chocolate, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate over simmering water in the top of a double saucepan.
2. Alternatively, melt the chocolate in the microwave on HIGH for 2 minutes.
3. Stir until smooth.
4. Combine the melted almonds and toasted almonds with the melted chocolate.
5. Drop teaspoonfuls of the mixture onto foil-covered trays.
6. Allow to set in a cool place.
7. Store in an airtight container in a cool place.
Makes about 25.
